event: Catskin — fairy tale illustration of a princess in a palace
description: A decorative fairy tale illustration shows an ornate palace interior with elaborate Eastern-influenced architecture. A figure in a long white gown or cloak stands within a richly decorated room featuring patterned walls, arched doorways, a pagoda-like tower, and a black and white checkerboard floor. Tropical plants appear on the left, and stylized trees and clouds fill the background. The color palette includes rich pinks, blues, and greens in an Art Nouveau-influenced style.
